title: French Onion Soup Gratin
description: Caramelized sweet onions, rich simmered beef broth, artisanal toasted sourdough gratinée with thick-cut cave-aged Gruyère.

title: Seared Atlantic Sea Scallops
description: Pan-seared Atlantic sea scallops, cauliflower silk purée, golden saffron-infused butter, organic garden microgreens.

title: Baked Vegetable Pastry Crust
description: Slow-roasted organic summer zucchini, eggplant, and heirloom tomatoes, baked inside a delicate, crispy vegan puff pastry shell.

title: Crispy Duck Breast with Orange Glaze
description: Crispy skin roasted duck breast, blood orange glaze, braised Belgian endive, parsnip mousse with nutmeg accents.

title: Wild Pan-Seared River Trout
description: Whole pan-seared river trout, nutty brown butter sauce, roasted slivered almonds, fresh lemon, chopped garden parsley.

title: Luxury Steak & Fries
description: Aged pasture-fed Angus ribeye steak, golden white truffle oil-dusted fries, house signature cognac and green peppercorn cream sauce.

title: Wild Mushroom Risotto
description: Creamy Carnaroli arborio rice, wild gathered chanterelle and porcini mushrooms, plant-based parmesan, black truffle oil drizzle.

title: Intense Dark Chocolate Soufflé
description: Molten 70% dark Valrhona chocolate soufflé, whipped double cream, fresh organic raspberries with gold leaf dusting.

title: Upside-Down Caramelized Pear Tart
description: Upside-down caramelized organic Bosc pears over crisp pastry, rich vegan cinnamon salted caramel syrup.

title: TasteHub Royal Cocktail
description: Fine Hennessy cognac, house-infused gold rosemary dry vermouth, elderflower liquor, topped with cold champagne float and gold flakes.

title: Rose & Cardamom Botanic Fizz
description: Zero-proof organic juniper distillation, botanical wild rose water, crushed cardamom pods, carbonated club soda spritz.
